name: markos
description: Marketing operating system. Briefs → drafts → audits → scheduled campaigns, grounded in a canon + literacy pipeline. 10 tools for research, planning, drafting, auditing, and execution.

tools.name: draft_message
tools.description: Generate a marketing draft from a channel+audience+pain+promise+brand brief.

tools.name: plan_campaign
tools.description: Produce a campaign plan outline from an objective + audience.

tools.name: research_audience
tools.description: Return an audience research snapshot for a segment key.

tools.name: run_neuro_audit
tools.description: Run a neuro-audit over a draft and return scored issues.

tools.name: generate_brief
tools.description: Generate a structured brief from a freeform prompt.

tools.name: audit_claim
tools.description: Verify whether a marketing claim is supported by canon evidence.

tools.name: rank_execution_queue
tools.description: Rank CRM execution-queue items for a tenant scope.

tools.name: schedule_post
tools.description: Schedule a post draft onto a channel queue.

tools.name: explain_literacy
tools.description: Explain a literacy node or archetype slug.
